notes: Systematic drift: every placement near the Kraken's Folly (both the deck half and the hold half) is keyed ~2-2.5 squares north of the rendered ship art, putting pins/tokens in open water — likely keyed against an earlier tile offset. Fixes above re-anchor them to the art.
